prompt: Add the silhouette-shaped beard from image 3 to the man's face in image 1, and overlay the steamed glass layer from image 2 in front of him so that it appears he is standing behind the wet glass.
prompt_refined: Modify image 1, the painted portrait of the man. Integrate the black silhouette beard from image 3 onto the lower part of his face, specifically over his chin and mouth area. Subsequently, overlay the distinct wet, water-streaked glass effect and water droplets from image 2 across the entire foreground of the image, making the man appear as if he is positioned behind this steamed and wet glass surface.
objects: black silhouette beard on the man's chin and mouth area
wet glass surface in the foreground
